transcription.text: Well, I usually get the rough and bumpy skin on the backs of my arms. New Gold Bond Rough and Bumpy Skin Therapy. Used daily, it exfoliates, smooths, softens. 90% saw smoother, softer skin in one week. Just nice and smooth. Gold Bond Ultimate Lotion, Ultimate Skin.
